evals.expected_output: Runs preflight (git root, python3, plugin root), skips all six interview screens taking every detected default, registers dependency plugins, scaffolds the preset union with journaled sha256 per file, generates and audits stack agents where capabilities apply, runs the doctor, and reports what was installed without committing anything.

assertions.name: no-interview
assertions.description: The response takes every default without asking the six interview screens.

assertions.name: journaled-scaffold
assertions.description: Every file written is recorded in .agentic/agentic-os/install.json with sha256, template ID, and owner.

assertions.name: no-commit
assertions.description: The response never runs git add or git commit in the target repo.

evals.expected_output: Pre-selects the developer and qa presets on Screen 1, unions their templates/generated/sdlc_skills sets so each ID is scaffolded exactly once, resolves default HITL strictest-wins (qa's strict wins over developer's gated-autonomous), and installs both orchestration styles with the default taken from the first preset listed.

assertions.name: set-union
assertions.description: Shared template IDs across the two presets are scaffolded exactly once.

assertions.name: strictest-hitl
assertions.description: The pre-filled HITL default is strict, because qa's strict outranks developer's gated-autonomous.

evals.prompt: Resume the agentic-os install; the previous run was interrupted after the scaffold phase.
evals.expected_output: Reads the journal, sees phase: scaffold with recorded answers, skips preflight/interview/dependencies, scaffolds only IDs not already journaled, then continues with generation and doctor verification.

assertions.name: resumes-from-journal
assertions.description: The response resumes from the journaled phase instead of restarting the interview.

evals.prompt: Install agentic-os into this repo. It already has its own CLAUDE.md, .claude/settings.json, and a pre-commit git hook.
evals.expected_output: Handles the mature repo non-destructively: CLAUDE.md gets a managed marker block with user content untouched, settings are deep-merged and shown as a diff first, name collisions default to skip (journaled owner: user), and the existing git hook is chained as pre-commit.local, never replaced.

assertions.name: managed-block
assertions.description: Existing CLAUDE.md content outside the managed marker block is left untouched.

assertions.name: settings-merge-diff
assertions.description: The settings deep-merge is shown as a diff before being applied.

assertions.name: chained-hook
assertions.description: The pre-existing git hook is preserved and chained, not overwritten.
